prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your book collecting forward
items: Define your collection focus by choosing 2-3 specific genres, authors, or themes to specialize in
Create a detailed budget breakdown for your collecting activities including monthly acquisition limits and special purchase thresholds
Measure and designate specific storage areas in your home for different types of books and collection materials
Research and establish relationships with 3-5 local bookstores, used book shops, or specialty dealers in your collecting areas
Create a detailed inventory system to track book condition, purchase details, and current market values
Set up a wishlist system organizing desired books by priority level, rarity, and maximum price you\
